narrative:
Precinct Senecaville (precinct in Guernsey County) has 246 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.9%, a clear Republican lean of 8.5 percentage points.
